item.title: Supreme Court Explains Contours of Sixth Amendment’s Right to Counsel in Villarreal v. Texas
item.description: The Sixth Amendment has long guaranteed a criminal defendant the right “to have the Assistance of Counsel for his defence.” But what does that right.....

item.title: Who Is Iran’s Next Leader?
item.description: Iran’s Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei is dead, and there is no clear successor to take his place. “The supreme leader made sure there was never... Read M...
